# playgroundDescription

**Instance Property**

A description of the classifier shown in a playground.

## Declaration

```swift
var playgroundDescription: Any { get }
```

## Describing a model

- **model**: The underlying Core ML model stored in memory.
- **description**: A text representation of the classifier.
- **debugDescription**: A text representation of the classifier that’s suitable for output during debugging.
